pi_items.source: setup_task.sh directly inserts 'Arthur' into the ptfname column of the patient table.
setup_task.sh directly inserts 'Pendelton' into the ptlname column of the patient table.
setup_task.sh directly inserts '1940-05-12' into the ptdob column of the patient table.
task.json specifies this as the expected date of death that the user is supposed to assign.

privileged_info_summary: The patient 'Arthur Pendelton' (DOB: 1940-05-12) is synthetically created in the FreeMED database by the setup script. The task requires setting the target date of death (ptdod) to 2026-03-01.
